items.label: Rule 01
items.title: A file is a record.
items.body: .json files hold structure. .md, .pdf, .png are opaque payloads. Metadata goes in a same-named .json sidecar.

items.label: Rule 02
items.title: A folder is a collection.
items.body: Any directory is a collection. Folders nest freely. index.json inside a folder is that folder's record.

items.label: Rule 03
items.title: The filename is the contract.
items.body: Names follow name[.modifier]*.ext. File form and folder form are the same identity — no rename, no broken refs.
